package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_bootstrap_per_file: Tests that rebuild the full application bootstrap repeatedly instead of using shared test setup.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule152NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule152NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule152NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario152Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule152NegativeService, input Rule152NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
